jumping_jacks.name: Jumping Jacks
jumping_jacks.instructions: Stand upright with feet together and arms at your sides. Jump while spreading your legs and raising your arms overhead. Jump back to the starting position and repeat.
common_mistakes: Landing too hard on the feet
breathing_tips: Inhale when returning to the starting position
Exhale as you jump and spread your arms and legs

abdominal_crunches.name: Abdominal Crunches
abdominal_crunches.instructions: Lie on your back with knees bent and feet flat on the floor. Place your hands behind your head. Lift your shoulders off the floor using your abs, then slowly lower back down.
common_mistakes: Pulling the neck with the hands
Lifting the lower back off the floor

russisn_twist.name: Russian Twist
russisn_twist.instructions: Sit on the floor with knees bent and lean slightly back. Lift your feet slightly off the ground. Twist your torso from side to side while keeping your core engaged.
common_mistakes: Moving only the arms instead of the torso
breathing_tips: Exhale as you twist to each side
Inhale as you return to the center

mountain_climber.name: Mountain Climber
mountain_climber.instructions: Start in a high plank position. Bring one knee toward your chest, then quickly switch legs. Continue alternating legs in a running motion.
breathing_tips: Exhale lightly as each knee drives forward

heel_touch.name: Heel Touch
heel_touch.instructions: Lie on your back with knees bent and feet flat. Keep arms by your sides. Reach your right hand toward your right heel, then alternate to the left side.
common_mistakes: Moving the neck instead of the torso
breathing_tips: Exhale as you reach toward the heel

leg_raises.name: Leg Raises
leg_raises.instructions: Lie flat on your back with legs straight. Place your hands beside you or under your hips. Lift both legs toward the ceiling, then slowly lower them without touching the floor.
breathing_tips: Exhale as you lift your legs

plank.name: Plank
plank.instructions: Start in a forearm plank position with elbows under shoulders. Keep your body in a straight line from head to heels. Hold the position while tightening your core.

cobra_strech.name: Cobra Stretch
cobra_strech.instructions: Lie face down with hands under your shoulders. Push through your palms to lift your chest while keeping hips on the floor. Hold the stretch gently.
breathing_tips: Inhale as you lift your chest
Breathe slowly and deeply while holding

spine_lumbar_twist_stretch_left.name: Spine Lumbar Twist Stretch Left
spine_lumbar_twist_stretch_left.instructions: Lie on your back and bend your knees. Drop both knees toward the left side while keeping shoulders on the floor. Hold the stretch.
breathing_tips: Exhale gently while relaxing into the stretch

spine_lumbar_twist_strech_right.name: Spine Lumbar Twist Stretch Right
spine_lumbar_twist_strech_right.instructions: Lie on your back and bend your knees. Drop both knees toward the right side while keeping shoulders flat on the floor. Hold the stretch.
breathing_tips: Exhale while deepening the stretch gently

crossover_crunch.name: Crossover Crunch
crossover_crunch.instructions: Lie on your back with knees bent. Bring your right elbow toward your left knee while lifting your shoulders. Return and alternate sides.
breathing_tips: Inhale when returning to the floor

side_bridges_left.name: Side Bridges Left
side_bridges_left.instructions: Lie on your left side with your elbow under your shoulder. Stack your legs and lift your hips off the ground. Hold your body in a straight line.
common_mistakes: Bending the body instead of keeping it straight

side_bridges_right.name: Side Bridges Right
side_bridges_right.instructions: Lie on your right side with your elbow under your shoulder. Keep legs stacked and lift your hips to form a straight line.
common_mistakes: Placing elbow too far from shoulder

butt_bridge.name: Butt Bridge
butt_bridge.instructions: Lie on your back with knees bent and feet flat on the floor. Push through your heels to lift your hips upward. Lower slowly back down.
common_mistakes: Arching the lower back too much
Feet placed too far from hips

bicycle_crunches.name: Bicycle Crunches
bicycle_crunches.instructions: Lie on your back with hands behind your head. Bring one knee toward your chest while rotating your opposite elbow toward it. Alternate sides in a pedaling motion.

v_up.name: V Up
v_up.instructions: Lie flat with arms extended overhead. Lift your legs and upper body at the same time to form a V shape. Lower slowly back down.

push_up and rotation.name: Push Up And Rotation
push_up and rotation.instructions: Start in a push-up position and perform one push-up. As you push back up, rotate your body and raise one arm toward the ceiling. Alternate sides.
breathing_tips: Inhale while lowering for the push-up
Exhale when pushing up and rotating

side_plank_right.name: Side Plank Right
side_plank_right.instructions: Lie on your right side with your elbow under your shoulder. Lift your hips and hold your body in a straight line.
common_mistakes: Elbow placed too far from shoulder

side_plank_left.name: Side Plank Left
side_plank_left.instructions: Lie on your left side with elbow under shoulder. Lift hips and keep your body straight while holding the position.

sit_ups.name: Sit Ups
sit_ups.instructions: Lie on your back with knees bent and feet on the floor. Lift your torso toward your knees using your abs. Lower slowly back down.
